title: gentiana excisa subsp. alpina
intro: Gentiana excisa subsp. alpina, also known as Alpine Gentian, is a rare and small perennial plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family, typically found in the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alpine Gentian include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit potential antiviral and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
